title: Blueprint Command Console
concept: A responsive tabbed operations workspace that makes Blueprint command search, gallery selection, URL editing, validation, run/copy/download actions, and replace-current warnings the primary workflow while preserving the active WordPress shell.
focus: Responsive tabbed console with mobile bottom navigation
Save, library, Site Manager, and portability continuity
flows: Search Blueprint commands, see grouped results, select a gallery entry, validate JSON, confirm replacement, run progress, and update the active shell and preview
Import a ZIP archive from Launch or Portability, validate the selected source, confirm replacement, show progress, and update the active Playground identity
Save the current temporary Playground to browser storage or to a local directory with distinct progress, storage badges, saved rows, and reload consequences
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open/manage, rename, delete confirmation, row removal, and active fallback state
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, files, Blueprint, database, and logs while Homepage, WP Admin, path, refresh, and storage state remain visible
featureCoverage: Delete saved Playground with confirmation and final state
Destructive reset and saved Save & Reload consequences
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty and saved states
Blueprint editor with validation, copy, download, run, warning, progress, and result states
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic warning state
Transfer history for GitHub, ZIP, database, and Blueprint bundle actions
